case_title: VASQUEZ, BRIGIDA vs. HINKSON, ROSE AKA J.W. FOSTER et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF VASQUEZ, BRIGIDA AS TO DEFENDANT HINKSON, ROSE AKA J.W. FOSTER JOHNSON, MARK AKA HERBERT M. JOHNSON AKA MARC CONL SUMMONS ISSUED

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF VASQUEZ, BRIGIDA SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON MAR-22-1995 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT HEARING SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR MAR-16-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01

JUDGMENT WAS REACHED BY STIPULATION. PLAINTIFF, BRIGIDA VAZQUEZ SHALL RECEIVE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF 426 FRANCISCO STREET, SAN FRANCISCO. A MONEY JUDGMENT OF $2,158 SHALL ALSO BE AWARDED PLAINTIFF. A WRIT OF POSSESSION SHALL ENTER IMMEDIATELY BUT SHALL BE STAYED UNTIL 9AM, ON 4-4-95. THERE ARE NO OTHER OCCUPANTS ON THE PREMISES WHO CAN CLAIM A RIGHT TO POSSESSION. THERE WON'T BE ANY FURTHER STAYS OF EXECUTION. EACH SIDE SHALL BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS. THERE WILL BE A MUTUAL RELEASE OF CLAIMS ON BOTH SIDES. IF DEFENDANT, ROSE HINKSON, VACATESS THE PREMISES IN A TIMELY FASHION, THE JUDGMENT SHALL BE CONSIDERED SATISFIED IN FULL AND THE CASE SHALL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HINKSON, ROSE AKA J.W. FOSTER THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 426 FRANCISCO STREET, SAN FRANCISCO $2,158.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,158.00, STAYED UNTIL APR-04-1995, LEASE FORFEITED
